meanings.definition: a type of folksong that originated among Black Americans at the beginning of the 20th century; has a melancholy sound from repeated use of blue notes

examples: he had a bad case of the blues

meanings.definition: blue color or pigment; resembling the color of the clear sky in the daytime
examples: he had eyes of bright blue

meanings.definition: any organization or party whose uniforms or badges are blue
examples: the Union army was a vast blue

meanings.definition: the sky as viewed during daylight
examples: he shot an arrow into the blue

meanings.definition: used to whiten laundry or hair or give it a bluish tinge
the sodium salt of amobarbital that is used as a barbiturate; used as a sedative and a hypnotic
any of numerous small butterflies of the family Lycaenidae
